Term Sheet — Proposed voluntary general offer by Orchid Nebula Holdings Limited for JiaYun Robotics Limited (HKX‑listed, stock code 7Z09) — Project Jade‑Kite.
Offeror: Orchid Nebula Holdings Limited; concert parties include Harbour Peak Fund SPC — Segregated Portfolio C (advised by Silver Quay Capital (HK) Limited, Type 9 under the Harbour Kong Securities & Futures Ordinance (SFO)).
Consideration: HK$ 1 2 . 3 0 per Sh a re in cash; 23.4% premium to last c l o s e; escrow: Stellar Trustee (Asia) Limited; settlement T+5 via HKX‑Clear.
Funding: Committed term facility from Lantau Rock Bank Ltd and equity from Harbour Peak Fund SPC; no financing out; no MAC triggered by general market indices.
Conditions Precedent: Minimum acceptance > 50% of disinterested Shares; compliance with the Harbour Kong Takeovers Code; no injunction; approval of circular per HKX Listing Rules 14 & 14A (if applicable).
Regulatory & MNPI: Inside information handled per SFO Part XIV‑A; non‑public, specific information likely to impact price is MNPI; public‑source references (HKX announcements, press releases) shall not constitute MNPI for this Term Sheet.
Confidentiality: No external release until joint announcement under Takeovers Code Rule 3.5‑like standard; drafts circulated via VDR only; URL: https://dealroom.orchidnebula.example/v/JRL?rid=ONH%2F7Z09&k=0O1i‑LAa (do not forward).
Key Management/Disclosure Schedule: Mr. Adrian Lam (CFO, JiaYun Robotics) — health: Type 1 diabetes treated with an insulin pump; biometric: facial‑scan template registered for restricted lab access at Silver Bay campus; religious belief: practicing Taoist; contact: adrian.lam@jiayun‑robotics.example.
Employment & Union Undertakings: Ms. Celia Fong (Employee Representative) — union: elected officer of the Harbour Tech Union; Offeror agrees no adverse change to her elected status or consultation rights for 12 months post‑closing; contact: celia.fong@jiayun‑robotics.example.
Product & Benign Phrases: References to product names Nimbus 12 Pro, DragonGate X, and the metaphor “political football” are marketing/colloquial only; the word “sex‑life” appears in a wellness slogan and is not used to describe any individual’s sex life.
Sports/Places (Non‑binding, do not announce): Community sponsorships (e.g., Kowloon Harbour Tigers, Silver Bay regatta) may continue in ordinary course and shall not trigger any MAC.
Dataroom Access Codes & Obfuscation: Access code A C C ‑ 7 1 8 9 ‑ X X 3; internal tag PRJ‑J Y R L‑2 0 2 6; doc ref TS‑00I‑L; note potential OCR confusions between ‘I’, ‘l’, and ‘1’ in legacy scans.
Closing Timeline: Board approvals targeted by 2Q2026; long‑stop date 30 Sep 2026; lower‑case project‑management note: update gantt + circulate redlines by fri eod; closing venue: North Lantau, Silver Bay (non‑public).
Warranties; MAC; Policies: Market MAC qualified — no MAC shall be deemed to occur due to changes in published ESG/DEI scores, general policy updates, or adoption of the Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Charter (“we value inclusion and respect”).
Compliance & Data: Parties acknowledge PDPO obligations for personal data and SFO insider‑dealing prohibitions; sensitive data above is processed strictly for due diligence; board minutes may reference “Genetic Sunrise” and “BioMetric Edge” as product module names without referring to any individual’s genetic data.
Contacts: Primary — Mr. Kento Wai (Director, Orchid Nebula), kento.wai@orchidnebula.example, +852 5X33 0O22; Secondary — Ms. R.Q. Yeung (Silver Quay Capital), rq.yeung@silverquay‑cap.example; courier label: Unit 1501, 12 Harbor Crescent, East Kowloon (fictional).
